summary: Live-applied ADR 0339 on `codex/ws-0339-live-apply` by adding governed reference deployment samples, replaceable provider profiles, a repo-managed render and validation helper, discovery and onboarding updates, and refreshed branch-local evidence on the latest realistic `origin/main` base before the exact-main release cut.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/reference_deployment_samples.py validate` passed on the rebased latest-main tree and is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-reference-samples-validate-r2-0.178.3.txt`.

verification.check: Focused discovery and sample regression slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_reference_deployment_samples.py tests/test_generate_discovery_artifacts.py` passed and is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-targeted-tests-r2-0.178.3.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/reference_deployment_samples.py render --sample single-node-proxmox-lab --profile dedicated-public-edge --output-dir /tmp/ws-0339-render-check-c48` succeeded, and `uv tool run --from ansible-core ansible-inventory -i /tmp/ws-0339-render-check-c48/inventory/hosts.yml --list` loaded the rendered inventory, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-render-r2-0.178.3.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-rendered-inventory-r2-0.178.3.json`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models` both passed after regenerating the rebased `workstreams.yaml` compatibility surface, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-workstream-surfaces-r2-0.178.3.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-validate-repo-r4-0.178.3.txt`.

`python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` reports repo version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, `0 workstreams in progress`, and only the pre-existing `controller_dependency_gap` waiver family blocking a fresh release cut through `2026-04-06`; `python3 scripts/release_manager.py --dry-run --bump patch` shows the next candidate release would be `0.178.4`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-release-status-r2-0.178.3.json` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0339-release-dry-run-r2-0.178.3.txt`.

notes: This branch-local receipt records the dedicated worktree proof for a repo-only ADR on the latest realistic `origin/main` base before the final exact-main release integration updates protected canonical-truth surfaces.

ADR 0339 changes fork bootstrap material, onboarding packs, and repository validation behavior rather than live deployed infrastructure, so `Implemented In Platform Version` remains `N/A` and the platform version stays `0.130.98`.
The exact-main integration step still needs to refresh the protected release surfaces from the freshest `origin/main`, record the canonical mainline receipt, and push `origin/main`.

correction_loop.repair_action: Declared the generated ADR shard families under the shared ADR-index contract and regenerated the coordination diagram after the first promotion-gate replay surfaced the missing ownership coverage and stale diagram artifact.
